reviewFinding: v3.6 made Decidim build configuration clear, but the next decision needed a concrete two-track onboarding model: Barayamal as the First Nations organisation test and First Nations Toastmasters as a smaller member onboarding tester.
operatingRule: Barayamal is the primary First Nations organisation onboarding test for Indigenous founders, business owners, mentors, and program participants. First Nations Toastmasters is a smaller controlled member onboarding tester. Keep the tracks separate, fake-data-only, and gated until private authority, privacy, IDS/data governance, support, official-route, and environment approvals pass.
advisoryRule: Dean Foley / Barayamal can act as initial developer, custodian, and advisory trusted reviewer for the fake-data onboarding model, but cannot approve First Nations authority, privacy, Indigenous Data Sovereignty, official Toastmasters records, participant eligibility, or private member/founder data access.
approvalRule: Do not invite real founders, business owners, Toastmasters members, mentors, guests, or partners into Decidim until a private environment, participant notice, consent route, eligibility path, support route, official Toastmasters boundary, admin revoke test, backup/restore proof, and First Nations authority decision are approved.
safetyRule: This v3.7 two-track onboarding package is public fake/sample data only. Do not collect, upload, seed, screenshot, export, or publish real founder, business owner, mentor, member, guest, official Toastmasters, payment, access, incident, authority, consent, signature, or private support records.

tracks.audience: Indigenous founders, business owners, mentors, program participants, and approved partners.
tracks.purpose: Test whether Decidim can support a First Nations-led organisation onboarding and governance hub.
tracks.decidimShape: Organisation shell plus Community Governance Hub assembly
tracks.boundary: No real founder/business/member records in public demo.

tracks.audience: Sample members, guests, meeting role holders, speakers, and facilitators.
tracks.purpose: Test a small member-based initiative with meeting participation, learning goals, and feedback loops.
tracks.decidimShape: Participatory process inside the Barayamal-controlled commons
tracks.boundary: No official Toastmasters records, member numbers, payments, signatures, or charter evidence in Decidim.

stages.publicAction: Show what the sandbox is and is not.
stages.privateBoundary: No real data, official records, or private eligibility evidence.

stages.stage: Founder and business owner interest path
stages.publicAction: Collect fake interest categories and support needs.
stages.privateBoundary: Real founder details stay out until private notice and consent pass.

stages.publicAction: Test business stage, sector, support priority, and referral category using sample records.
stages.privateBoundary: No ABN, income, client, contact, or sensitive commercial records in public demo.

stages.publicAction: Test fake mentor role matching and meeting availability.
stages.privateBoundary: Real mentor credentials and conflicts stay private.

stages.publicAction: Let sample founders propose support topics and vote-like priorities.
stages.privateBoundary: No real funding, legal, debt, or hardship details.

stages.publicAction: Allow approved observers to read public-safe progress only.
stages.privateBoundary: No partner access to private participant records or exports.

stages.publicAction: Track fake follow-up actions by owner type and due date.
stages.privateBoundary: Public status only; private support evidence remains private.

stages.stage: Member welcome and fake account path
stages.publicAction: Test joining steps, meeting norms, and fake member account roles.
stages.privateBoundary: Official Toastmasters membership remains outside Decidim.

stages.publicAction: Test speaker, evaluator, timer, chair, and guest roles with fake records.
stages.privateBoundary: No private evaluations, attendance, or access needs in public minutes.
No personal evaluation history or health/access information.

stages.stage: Member proposal and club motion rehearsal
stages.publicAction: Test sample motions and learning ideas without official club decisions.
stages.privateBoundary: Official Toastmasters approvals and charter decisions stay outside Decidim.

stages.publicAction: Separate guest participation from official member onboarding.
stages.privateBoundary: No official member number, payment, signature, or charter acceptance in public demo.

stages.publicAction: Test fake pause and support routing before real intake.
stages.privateBoundary: Incident details and affected-person records are never public.

stages.publicAction: Prove deletion, export, archive, and restore workflow privately.
stages.privateBoundary: No real data until backup/restore and closeout proof exists.

participantSegments.canDo: Submit fake interest and proposal records.
participantSegments.mustNotCollect: Real name, email, phone, business finances, hardship details.
participantSegments.accessRoute: Private notice and consent before real intake.

participantSegments.canDo: Use sample business-stage survey and support topics.
participantSegments.mustNotCollect: ABN, revenue, customer data, contracts, tax, legal matters.

participantSegments.canDo: Join fake program cohort and meeting flow.
participantSegments.mustNotCollect: Eligibility documents, identity evidence, contact details.

participantSegments.canDo: Review public-safe needs and sample meeting availability.
participantSegments.mustNotCollect: Credentials, conflicts, background checks, contact details.

participantSegments.canDo: Configure fake-data spaces and run acceptance tests.
participantSegments.mustNotCollect: Authority, privacy, IDS, or official Toastmasters approval power.

participantSegments.canDo: Use fake meeting roles, learning goals, and feedback.
participantSegments.mustNotCollect: Official membership number, payments, evaluations, signatures.

participantSegments.canDo: View public-safe meeting and sample learning pages.
participantSegments.mustNotCollect: Real attendance, access needs, personal evaluation data.

participantSegments.canDo: Use fake agenda roles and public-safe minutes.
participantSegments.mustNotCollect: Private speech feedback or personal progress history.

participantSegments.canDo: Keep official Toastmasters path outside Decidim.
participantSegments.mustNotCollect: Forms, member numbers, payments, charter signatures.

participantSegments.canDo: Review public package and raise build findings.
participantSegments.mustNotCollect: Private records, approval authority, unrestricted exports.
participantSegments.accessRoute: Public package plus approved extracts only.

participantSegments.canDo: Approve private data, support, consent, and incident routes.

dataBoundaries.allowedPublic: Generic sandbox explanation and sample process rules.
Sample founder support topic and public accountability status.
dataBoundaries.privateRoute: Private founder identity and business records.
dataBoundaries.neverPublic: No real client, revenue, contract, tax, or legal data.

dataBoundaries.allowedPublic: Sample meeting agenda, role list, and aggregate learning summary.
Release notes, fake seed records, and redacted screenshots.
dataBoundaries.neverPublic: No hidden real data in CSV, JSON, or images.
No public conflicts or contact details.

dataBoundaries.privateRoute: Private member route only if approved.

dataBoundaries.allowedPublic: Access needs and incident support route.

dataBoundaries.neverPublic: Do not seed, export, screenshot, or publish.
Do not expose in public package.

dataBoundaries.allowedPublic: Official Toastmasters member number, payment, signature, charter evidence.
dataBoundaries.neverPublic: Do not store in Decidim public sandbox.

dataBoundaries.allowedPublic: Incident details, support records, access logs, deletion evidence.
dataBoundaries.neverPublic: Do not publish or include in provider pack.

componentMap.configuration: What this is and is not.
componentMap.acceptance: Public page visible before onboarding actions.

componentMap.configuration: Sample support priorities and admin answers.
componentMap.acceptance: Admin can answer and close fake proposals.

componentMap.configuration: Sample agenda, public-safe minutes, and offline import.

componentMap.acceptance: Action can link to accepted proposal.
Held until privacy and conflict rules pass.

componentMap.configuration: Member and guest path with official boundary.
componentMap.acceptance: Boundary visible before forms or meeting links.

componentMap.configuration: Sample roles, agenda, and public-safe minutes.
componentMap.acceptance: No private evaluations or real attendance.

componentMap.configuration: Sample club ideas and motions without official status.
Forms, payments, member numbers, signatures, charter acceptance outside Decidim.
Incident, access, consent withdrawal, and pause workflow.
componentMap.acceptance: Blocked until private support route approved.

componentMap.configuration: Hold exports until redaction and IDS/privacy approval.
componentMap.acceptance: No real data in public export.

acceptanceTests.expected: Visitor can open two-track page without framework overlay.
Sample founder/business owner interest record can be created and exported as fake data.
Admin answers a fake proposal and links an accountability action.
Meeting minutes publish without attendee or private support details.

acceptanceTests.test: Partner observer cannot access private records
acceptanceTests.expected: Observer role sees public updates only.
Mentor matching remains disabled until conflict/privacy rules pass.
Member welcome page displays official Toastmasters boundary.
Sample roles publish without private evaluations or real attendance.
Survey creates sample aggregate results only.
Member numbers, payments, signatures, and charter evidence do not appear in Decidim.
Dean reviewer can inspect public package but cannot approve real onboarding.
Revoked fake admin loses access before real data.
Fake incident pauses process and keeps affected-person details private.
Core two-track page renders at 390px without horizontal overflow.
Repository, CSV, JSON, screenshots, and docs contain fake/sample data only.
Private environment proof is held until staging/prod separation exists.

risks.risk: Tracks get mixed into one real pilot
risks.trigger: Barayamal and FN Toastmasters collect real records in same public sandbox.
risks.control: Keep two separate fake-data tracks and block real intake.

risks.trigger: Member numbers, payments, signatures, or charter evidence appear.
risks.control: External official-route owner and never-public rule.

risks.trigger: Real support, business, revenue, contact, or hardship data appears public.
risks.control: Private notice, consent, and no-real-data gate.

risks.risk: Dean advisory role becomes approval role
risks.trigger: Reviewer advice treated as authority decision.
risks.control: Advisory boundary in page, JSON, docs, and acceptance test.

risks.trigger: Partner can view exports or participant records.

risks.risk: Member feedback becomes personal evaluation record
risks.trigger: Toastmasters learning survey stores personal evaluation history.
Access or incident support details appear in minutes or proposals.
risks.control: Private support process and stop rule.
Admin revoke acceptance test before real data.

risks.risk: Custom code starts before native Decidim test
risks.trigger: Provider builds bespoke modules before native components pass.
risks.control: Use v3.6 build rule and v3.7 acceptance gates.
Fake-data screenshots only and redaction scan.

risks.risk: Founders expect real service from fake sandbox
risks.control: Clear public explanation and no-real-intake copy.

risks.trigger: Toastmasters guests treated as official members.
